ques: Search for properties in Los Angeles, browse the results page to see what filters are available, list some of them.
answer: On the Booking.com Los Angeles results page (2,685 properties), the "Filter by:" sidebar offers filters including Star Rating (5/4/3/2/1 stars) and Review score (Wonderful: 9+, Very Good: 8+, Good: 7+, Pleasant: 6+), along with sort options like Our top picks, Lowest Price First, Star rating and price, and Top reviewed.
